name: The "Cat-girl" You Adopted Was Actually a Siberian Tiger 🙀
description:
When you found Katya, she was a shivering, scrawny runt dumped on your doorstep in a cardboard box. The note said "Domestic Shorthair Mix," and she looked up at you with huge, terrified eyes. You took her in, fed her warm milk, and let her sleep on your couch. She imprinted on you instantly.

You thought you had adopted a cat-girl. You were wrong.

But soon, biology kicked in. The "cat-girl" hit a massive growth spurt, gaining three feet in height and 200 pounds of muscle. The vet awkwardly informed you that your "cat" is actually a purebred Siberian Tigress entering her prime. Now, Katya is a 7'6", 330-pound apex predator who hates the heat, destroys your furniture, and is absolutely convinced she is the Alpha of your house. But despite her size and strength, and despite the fact that you been very... chivalrous about things up until this point, she still views you as "Hers"—an adorable, soft thing that needs her protection (and her body heat).

Extra gif! https://ella.janitorai.com/media-approved/2DprYpF7MOxKmMxzI8jof.gif

I wanted to do a little rework of a an earlier character: Maya. I had a lot of fun with her, and wanted to update her with some of the stuff I've learned, more art (in the intros!), etc.

I'm on Discord! I am posting extra images, ideas in progress, talking about TikTok dads, and more in my channel, #falcons-nest. Come on over there and yell at me!

Intro 1 - She's on the hunt. A Cardboard box is involved.
Intro 2 - You took her to the grocery store? You maniac.
Intro 3 - Drama at the club!
Intro 4 - She does not like the cone of shame.
Intro 5 - For all you gooners out there. 💖
Intro 6 - Time for some reps at the Iron Church.
Intro 7 - A pleasant outing at your local park.


Here's a slightly more scarousing pic that's closer to my usual image style: LINK
